scripts.dump: DUMP_FILE=database/dump-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).sql && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env exec -T db sh -c 'mysqldump --no-tablespaces -u"$MYSQL_USER" -p"$MYSQL_PASSWORD" "$MYSQL_DATABASE" 2>/dev/null' > "$DUMP_FILE" && echo "✔ Database exported to $DUMP_FILE"
scripts.reset: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env down -v 2>/dev/null; rm -rf public .env .setup-state node_modules vendor && echo '✔ Project reset. Run npm run setup to start fresh.'
